title: SORA-264 One Yui Kawagoe ♀ ♀ ♀ Yui Kawagoe ...... Rin Saetsuki Yui Kawagoe
description: I go to ● Senior Kawagoe at the school. Class ... no no grade ... no no school Madonna. A talented woman in both Bunbu and Budo. And a little naughty. Of course, it goes without saying that it is a flower of Takamine in the school. However, I really wanted to convey this feeling, and when I made a confession of the first generation with the determination to break the jade ... However, Kawagoe-senpai looks strange. Am I pitying for me who shook me, maybe a big laugh in my heart? No, with a very serious look! "Rin-kun, I'm a lily from the ground up. So I couldn't go out with a boy ... But if you were, for example ..." I can go out with you when I become a girl ... Do you agree with Japanese, senior? To be exact, I was unilaterally made a girl by my seniors, with half-belief. Honestly, it's not bad for me to be reflected in the mirror. No, maybe! When I was jumping in my heart, my senior robbed me of my lips ...
